title: Historical Archive Quiet State
goal: Implement #476 so historical archive-derived continuation candidates remain audit evidence without blocking ordinary quiet-state startup when current external and roadmap work are closed.
non_goals: Do not delete or hide historical audit evidence.
Do not weaken active TODO, active execplan, roadmap, or open external work routing.
Do not create a new startup surface.

intent.outcome: Compact summary can report a genuinely quiet current-work state after all open issues are closed.
intent.constraints: Keep historical follow-up candidates discoverable as audit pressure; only reduce their authority as current execution pressure when no current owner exists.
intent.latitude: Patch planning summary readiness routing and add focused tests.
intent.escalation: Escalate if the fix would suppress active or externally open continuation work.

execution.next_step: Archive, commit, push, close #476, refresh external evidence, then confirm quiet state.
execution.proof: focused planning tests, lint, planning checks, and proof selector.

invariants: Open external work and roadmap work still route into current execution pressure.
Historical audit candidates remain present in finished_work_inspection_contract.
Quiet state means no active items, no active execplans, no roadmap items, and no open external work.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: Make package operation streamlined, lightweight, frictionless, cheap, modular, and small while preserving leverage.

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: Idle summaries stop turning historical archive residue into current work after current work is closed.
iterative_follow_through.next likely slice: none if summary/reconcile show no open work after closure.

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Fix dogfooding friction discovered during autopilot closeout.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Dogfood package surfaces, commit/push milestone, close issue only after proof.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Exact quiet-state status name and test shape.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: A change would hide open or selected current work.

active_milestone.scope: planning summary readiness routing and tests

immediate_next_action: Archive, commit, push, close #476, refresh external evidence, then confirm quiet state.

context_budget.live working set: planning summary readiness routing, focused planning tests, active planning record.
context_budget.recoverable later: Archived execplan, #476 issue, and test fixture.
context_budget.externalize before shift: Archive this plan, close #476, refresh external evidence, and verify compact summary no longer reports historical archive candidates as current execution pressure.
context_budget.pre-work memory pull: not needed; dogfooding observation and issue body contain the relevant facts
context_budget.tiny resumability note: Finish #476 quiet-state routing and verify final summary/reconcile.
context_budget.context-shift triggers: Any change that hides open external work, roadmap work, or active planning state.

validation_commands: uv run ruff check packages/planning/src packages/planning/tests

uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed packages/planning/src/repo_planning_bootstrap/installer.py packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/historical-archive-quiet-state.plan.json .agentic-workspace/planning/external-intent-evidence.json --format json
cd packages/planning && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py
cd packages/planning && uv run ruff check .
uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --section workflow_obligations --format json
uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --section closeout_trust --format json
completion_criteria: Quiet current state no longer reports intent-continuation-needs-promotion only because archived candidates exist.
Historical derived candidates remain visible as audit evidence.
Open external work and roadmap work still route as current pressure.
Focused tests cover the quiet-state case.

execution_run.handoff source: Dogfooding finding and GitHub issue #476 plus agentic-workspace preflight, summary, report, proof, reconcile, and doctor surfaces
execution_run.what happened: Changed planning summary readiness so archive-derived historical candidates become audit-only when loaded external evidence, roadmap state, active items, and active execplans are all quiet. Added tests for both open-work blocking and quiet-state audit behavior.
execution_run.changed surfaces: Planning package implementation, planning package tests, active execplan, planning state, external evidence.
execution_run.validations run: pytest packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py, ruff for planning package, proof selector, selected planning package commands, planning doctor, preflight, summary, workflow obligations report, closeout trust report, reconcile.
execution_run.result for continuation: #476 is implemented; after closure and evidence refresh the repo should return to no open current work.
execution_run.next step: Archive this plan, commit, push, close #476, refresh evidence, and confirm quiet state.

proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: pytest packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py, ruff for planning package, proof selector, selected planning package commands, planning doctor, preflight, summary, workflow obligations report, closeout trust report, reconcile.

finished_run_review.config compliance: package workflow was dogfooded through preflight, summary, report, proof, reconcile, and doctor surfaces
finished_run_review.follow-on decision: close #476 after commit and final evidence refresh

intent_satisfaction.original intent: Fix dogfooding friction discovered during autopilot closeout.
intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: The bounded slice is complete; archive-plan --prepare-closeout generated normalized closeout fields.

closure_check.why this decision is honest: The bounded slice and larger intent are both complete.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: Prepared closeout records intent satisfaction, closure decision, proof evidence, and distillation buckets.
closure_check.reopen trigger: None unless new evidence shows the bounded closure was incomplete.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: Historical archive pressure no longer blocks ordinary quiet-state routing when current external and roadmap work are closed.
execution_summary.post-work posterity capture: archive this execplan and close the issue with validation evidence
execution_summary.knowledge promoted (memory/docs/config): test coverage only; no Memory promotion needed

improvement_signal_review.friction: The quiet-state dogfooding pass exposed that historical audit residue could outweigh clean current-work evidence.
improvement_signal_review.action: Fixed in this slice by gating archive-derived execution pressure on loaded current external work and roadmap state.

discard.summary: Command-by-command execution detail stays in the archived proof record.

memory.summary: test coverage only; no Memory promotion needed

config_check.summary: test coverage only; no Memory promotion needed
